title: Silky Thai Masarepa Curry
description: A salty, silky, and comforting Thai dish featuring white masarepa, simmered to perfection in a flavorful and paleo-friendly curry sauce.
instructions: In a large pot, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat.
Add the Thai red curry paste and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Add the white masarepa and stir to combine, cooking for 2 minutes.
Add the fish sauce, lime juice, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the diced grilled chicken and sliced bell peppers, and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10 minutes.
Stir in the chopped Thai basil and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with additional Thai basil if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
